templates.name: raf-homepage
templates.description: RAF Recruitment homepage with hero video, apprenticeships video embed, dual-panel CTA sections, diversity text section, and contact banner

blocks.name: embed-featured
blocks.notes: Parser also extracts h2 heading, h3 subtitle, description text, and CTA link from within .videosingle and adjacent .apprenticeships-cta-container. Section style 'apprenticeships' applies italic rotated h2, full-width embed, and custom h3/button styling.

blocks.name: section-diversity
blocks.notes: Section style 'diversity' applies italic rotated headings and renders the CTA link as a 67px circle arrow icon via CSS background-image.

blocks.name: section-contact
blocks.notes: Dark section with centered heading, subtitle, and two CTA buttons (Live Chat + Contact Us) displayed side-by-side.

templates.name: roles-finder
templates.description: RAF role detail page with hero image, role info panel (salary, status, tags), dual-panel text+image sections, entry requirements accordion, training carousel, benefits grid, application process steps, apply CTA, similar roles cards, and contact banner

blocks.name: hero
blocks.notes: Simple hero with H1 title and background image. No video, no body text.

blocks.name: columns-roleinfo
blocks.notes: Custom structured layout with recruiting status, interest tags, dual salary tiers (initial + after 3 years), role description, Apply CTA, and in-page navigation links.

blocks.name: columns
blocks.notes: Standard two-column text+image layouts. First instance: text-left/image-right (What will you do?). Second instance: image-left/text-right (Requirements at a glance).

blocks.name: accordion
blocks.notes: Entry requirements with 7 expandable panels (Education, Nationality, Fitness, Swimming, Health, Background Checks, Disqualifying Factors). H2 heading and subheader above accordion. Light blue background (rgb(205,225,255)).

blocks.name: carousel-training
blocks.notes: 6 numbered training phase cards (Phase one through Transferable skills) with subtitle, duration icon, location icon, and expandable description. Dark navy background with prev/next navigation.

blocks.name: section-whyjoin-officer
blocks.notes: Default content section: H2 heading, paragraph, and Discover more CTA link. Dark navy background, centered text.

blocks.name: cards-benefits
blocks.notes: 6 benefit icon+label cards (Rent, Free gym, Subsidised food, Health care, World travel, Training). H2 heading, subtitle, and View all benefits CTA. Light blue background.

blocks.name: carousel-steps
blocks.notes: 7 numbered application step cards (Aptitude test through Offer of service) with stage indicators and rich text descriptions. Dark background with background images per step.

blocks.name: columns-cta
blocks.notes: Apply Now CTA section: H2 heading, text, and Apply button on left; large image on right. Reuses existing columns-cta variant from homepage.

blocks.name: cards-roles
blocks.notes: Similar roles card carousel with role cards showing category, title, interest tags, and favourites button. Light blue background with prev/next navigation and 'Roles in the RAF' link.

blocks.name: section-contact
blocks.notes: Dark banner with H2 heading and two CTA buttons (Live Chat + Contact Us). Same pattern as homepage contact section.
